items.title: 'BTS is everything for us': K-pop fans gather in Seoul for comeback show
items.dek: Some 260,000 fans are expected to watch BTS perform together on Saturday for the first time since 2022.
items.body: Some 260,000 fans are expected to watch BTS perform together on Saturday for the first time since 2022.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: A Kremlin loyalist suddenly turned against Putin. A day later, he was in a psychiatric hospital.

items.title: Russian drone attack kills two in Ukraine ahead of talks in US, officials say
items.dek: Two children, aged 11 and 15 were also injured in the attack which took place in Zaporizhzhia.
items.body: Two children, aged 11 and 15 were also injured in the attack which took place in Zaporizhzhia.
